name: UBA : DoS Attack by Account Deletion
notes: Detects DoS attack by checking the number of account deletion events against a fixed threshold within fixed time span (default value 20 events within 1 minute). Prior to enabling this rule, Admins have to configure this value based on the size of their organization, the average number of people leaving the organization, etc.
bb_references: BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 20 times in 1 minutes
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 20 times in 1 minutes
thresholds: when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 20 times in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : DoS Attack by Account Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 20 times in 1 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : DoS Attack by Account Deletion
